note: DEGENERATE — batch-collapse bug (035cfa3 is the parent of fix 4a95cfd) left ~10 distinct vec0 rows per 10K writes; brute-force GT and production returned the same trivially-small set, so recall=1.0 is a measurement artifact, NOT a real verdict. Retained for the faithful arc: the bug masqueraded as an IMPROVEMENT, so this degradation detector flags the regression-shaped correction that follows it, not the bug itself (see dev/design/perf-regression-detection.md).
